title: fumana glutinosa var. viridis
intro: Fumana glutinosa var. viridis, also known as the green sticky cinquefoil, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Fumana glutinosa var. viridis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in topical applications and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
